results.title: Customers spending less as businesses pinched by Iran war crisis
results.description: Australians are spending less despite the worst impacts of the Middle East fuel crisis in the past, new data has revealed.

results.title: 'Slow Poison’: Arvind Kejriwal Explodes Over Fuel Hikes, Warns Petrol May Hit Rs 150
results.description: Fuel prices in India have surged for the third time in 15 days, increasing by Rs 4 to Rs 5 per litre, alongside a significant rise in gas cylinder costs. Amidst fuel shortages and long lines at petrol stations, Aam Aadmi Party leader Arvind Kejriwal criticised the central government for these hikes, labelling them as a “slow poison.”

results.title: Revenue Minister Suresh Pujari Warns People Against Stepping Out After 11 AM
results.description: #ପ ୍ରବଳ_ଖରା #୧୧ଟ ାରେ_ପରେ_ଘରୁ_ବାହାରନି ପ୍ରବଳ ଖରାକୁ ନେଇ ଲୋକଙ୍କୁ ରାଜସ୍ବମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ସୁରେଶ ପୂଜାରୀଙ୍କ ପରାମର୍ଶ ୧୧ଟାରେ ପରେ ଘରୁ ବାହାରନି। ୧୧ଟାରୁ ୩ଟା ଯାଏଁ ଶ୍ରମିକମାନେ ବାହାରେ କାମ କରିବା ପାଇଁ ମନା ରହିଛି। ଯେଉଁମାନେ ଅତି ଆବଶ୍ୟକ ସ୍ଥଳେ ୧୧ଟାରୁ ୩ଟା ମଧ୍ୟରେ ବାହାରକୁ ଯାଉଛନ୍ତି ପାଣି, ଓଦା ଗାମୁଛା ଆଦି ନେଇକି ଯାଆନ୍ତୁ। ୨ ତାରିଖ ଯାଏଁ ଏମିତି ଖରା ରହିବ। Revenue Minister Suresh Pujari has advised people not to step out of their homes after 11 AM due to the prevailing severe heatwave conditions. He said labourers have been prohibited from working outdoors between 11 AM and 3 PM as part of precautionary measures. People going out for urgent work during these hours have been advised to carry drinking water and a wet Gamucha (traditional cotton towel) to avoid heat-related illness. According to the minister, the intense heat conditions are likely to continue till the 2nd. The advisory has been issued to ensure public safety amid rising temperatures and harsh summer conditions across the state. #HeatwaveAlert_SureshPujari #OdishaHeatwave #SummerSafety #HeatwaveWarning #ExtremeHeat #WorkerSafety #PublicAdvisory #OdishaNews #HeatwavePrecaution_Odisha #OutdoorWorkBan_Odisha #SureshPujari_HeatAlert #OdishaTV #OTV For latest news updates follow us on WhatsApp: https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029VaYNIW78qIzrtKKZiD3M OdishaTV is Odisha's no 1 News Channel. results.title: US overtakes Mauritius to become India’s 2nd largest FDI source as inflows cross $11 billion mark
results.description: The investment landscape is changing. The United States has now claimed the title of India's second-largest foreign investor, overtaking Mauritius. Equity infusions from America more than doubled to exceed $11 billion during the 2025-26 period. While Singapore holds the crown, sectors such as food processing, computer hardware, and shipping are experiencing exciting development.

results.title: 9 States With No State Income Tax — But Living There Isn’t Always Cheap
results.description: If you were surprised to learn how many states don’t charge a state income tax, you’re probably not living in one of them. At first glance, moving to a no-income-tax state can sound like an easy financial win. But lower taxes don’t always mean lower living costs.
